SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Lien Lac, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Hang Haong Gee, who was placed under oath and examined.
Lien Lac was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant Yan Ming Chen.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 29, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Hang Haong Gee, and against defendant Yan Ming Chen, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,750.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,785.00.
Costs - $299.50.
Total - $3,834.50.

Additionally, plaintiff Hang Haong Gee is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 180 Peabody Street, San Francisco, CA 94134. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
